allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://api.nusmods.com/v2/2025-2026/modules" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 20; $data = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; "Array length: $\($data.Length\)"; "First module: $\($data[0].moduleCode\) - $\($data[0].title\)"; "First sem data: $\($data[0].semesterData | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\)" } catch { $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://api.nusmods.com/v2/2025-2026/modules" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; $status = $r.StatusCode; $bytes = [Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\($r.Content\); $size = $bytes.Length; $first = $r.Content.Substring\(0, 300\); Write-Output "Status: $status"; Write-Output "Size: $\($size / 1MB -as [int]\) MB"; Write-Output "First 300 chars: $first" } catch { $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://api.nusmods.com/v2/2025-2026/moduleInfo.json" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; $content = $r.Content; Write-Output "Size: $\($content.Length / 1MB -as [int]\) MB"; $first = $content.Substring\(0, 500\); Write-Output "First 500 chars: $first" } catch { $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://api.nusmods.com/v2/2025-2026/moduleInfo.json" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60; $data = $r.Content; $len = $data.Length; $firstModuleEnd = $data.IndexOf\('},', 0\) + 1; $firstMod = $data.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(3000, $firstModuleEnd + 200\)\); Write-Output "First module JSON:"; Write-Output $firstMod } catch { $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://api.nusmods.com/v2/2025-2026/moduleList.json" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; $c = $r.Content.Substring\(0, 1000\); Write-Output "moduleList.json structure:"; Write-Output $c } catch { $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://api.nusmods.com/v2/2025-2026/moduleInformation.json" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; $c = $r.Content; Write-Output "moduleInformation.json \(lowercase 'i'\)"; Write-Output "Size: $\($c.Length / 1MB -as [int]\) MB"; Write-Output $c.Substring\(0, 1000\) } catch { $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://api.nusmods.com/v2/2025-2026/moduleInfo.json" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 120; $c = $r.Content; $hasTimetable = $c -match '"timetable"'; Write-Output "Contains timetable: $hasTimetable"; $henTimetable = $c -match '"weeks"'; Write-Output "Contains weeks: $henTimetable"; $cs1010Clash = $c -match '"CS1010"'; Write-Output "Has CS1010: $cs1010Clash" } catch { Write-Output "Error: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://api.nusmods.com/v2/2025-2026/modules/CS1010.json" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; $data = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $data.semesterData[0].timetable | Select-Object venue, day, startTime, endTime, lessonType, weeks | Format-Table -AutoSize } catch { Write-Output "Error: $_" })
